```prompt
---
agent: agent
description: "Implement network security and firewall rules"
---
# Network Security
## Task
Configure network security controls and firewall rules.
## Requirements
1. Define network segmentation (DMZ, app, data tiers). 2. Configure ingress/egress firewall rules.
3. Implement network policies for container environments. 4. Restrict outbound access to necessary services only.
5. Monitor network traffic for anomalies.
## Constraints
- Default deny all. Explicit allow per service. Log all denied traffic.
## Success Criteria
- Network segmented. Default deny enforced. Traffic monitored. Rules documented.
```
